ddls:
CREATE TABLE "postal_codes" (
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postal code for an area */,
  "eastings" INTEGER /* Eastings coordinate */,
  "northings" INTEGER /* Northings coordinate */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the postal code location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the postal code location */,
  "town" TEXT /* Name of the town */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location */,
  "uk_region" TEXT /* UK region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "country_string" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "towns" (
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each town */,
  "town_name" TEXT /* Name of the town */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region in which the town is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "uk_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the UK region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uk_regions" (
  "uk_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UK region */,
  "uk_region_name" TEXT /* Name of the UK region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uk_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery route */,
  "start_postcode" TEXT /* Starting postal code of the route */,
  "end_postcode" TEXT /* Ending postal code of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time for the route in minutes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the delivery route */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle assigned to the route */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver assigned to the route */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_routes_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_routes_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_routes_end_postcode FOREIGN KEY ("end_postcode") REFERENCES postal_codes ("postcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_routes_start_postcode FOREIGN KEY ("start_postcode") REFERENCES postal_codes ("postcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "contact_details" TEXT /* Contact details of the driver */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "sender_postcode" TEXT /* Postal code of the sender */,
  "recipient_postcode" TEXT /* Postal code of the recipient */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the package in kilograms */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the package */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the package */,
  "delivery_route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delivery route */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_sender_postcode FOREIGN KEY ("sender_postcode") REFERENCES postal_codes ("postcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_delivery_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_route_id") REFERENCES delivery_routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_recipient_postcode FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_postcode") REFERENCES postal_codes ("postcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_details" TEXT /* Contact details of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the package */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_status_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the user operates in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the feedback submission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delivery route */,
  "average_time" INTEGER /* Average delivery time in minutes */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of deliveries */,
  "customer_satisfaction" REAL /* Customer satisfaction score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES delivery_routes ("route_id")
)
